messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0024",
  "title": "17 英雄游戏 从多赛道深耕到高品质突破：英雄游戏全球化战略的升维",
  "page_index": 18,
  "page_range": "18"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0025",
    "title": "内容升维： 通过极具辨识度的美术风格与“多维武器组合 ×立体战斗”的高自由度战斗机制，打破传统动作游戏的品类边界，在多轮全球测试中展现了极高的玩家期待度。",
    "page_range": "18",
    "summary": "This section answers questions regarding the game's core design innovations and pre-launch market reception. Topics covered include content dimension upgrades, action game genre boundaries, combat mechanics, and artistic direction. Key entities referenced are the game project, traditional action games, and global test participants. It claims that a highly recognizable art style paired with a high-freedom \"multi-dimensional weapon combinations × 3D combat\" system breaks traditional genre limits. The evidence type is qualitative player sentiment, specifically citing extremely high anticipation demonstrated across multiple rounds of global testing. The section contains no specific dates, quantitative metrics, procedural steps, formal definitions, tables, or figures. It is optimized for retrieving information on the project's unique artistic and mechanical pillars, genre differentiation strategy, and global test player feedback."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0026",
    "title": "多端布局： 适配PC、移动端等多平台，顺应全球玩家跨设备交互趋势，通过高精度的技术实现与沉浸式叙事，塑造差异化的全球 IP影响力。",
    "page_range": "18",
    "summary": "**Topics:** Multi-platform game adaptation (PC/mobile), cross-device interaction trends, global IP influence building, refined operations for mature titles, global localization strategies, and core game development/publishing methodologies.\n**Entities:** 英雄游戏 (Hero Games), 《新三国志》, 《Last Island of Survival》, Japan market, Southeast Asia market, Middle East market, PC platforms, mobile platforms.\n**Dates:** None specified.\n**Definitions/Methodologies:** Defines the company’s established operational framework as “前置高品质研发 + 全球多端协同 + 精准本地化发行” (front-loaded high-quality R&D, global multi-platform synergy, precise localized publishing).\n**Procedures/Strategies:** Details approaches for cross-platform technical adaptation, long-term refined management of mature products, and region-specific localized publishing to build global operational foundations.\n**Claims:** Asserts that Hero Games successfully balances high-quality new development with mature product operations, has formed a proven global operational methodology, and will continue prioritizing innovative content to deliver diverse, high-expectation gaming experiences worldwide.\n**Evidence Types:** Relies on specific product-market case studies (e.g., 《新三国志》 in Japan, 《Last Island of Survival》 in Southeast Asia/Middle East) as qualitative evidence of long-term market stability and localization success.\n**Tables/Figures/Metrics:** None included in this section."
  }
]

message.content: This section details Hero Games' (英雄游戏) strategic evolution toward high-quality global expansion, focusing on content innovation and multi-platform deployment. Topics covered include action game genre boundary expansion, high-freedom combat mechanics, distinctive artistic direction, cross-device (PC/mobile) adaptation, global IP influence building, and long-term refined operations for mature titles. Entities referenced are Hero Games, the featured game project, traditional action games, global test participants, 《新三国志》, 《Last Island of Survival》, and regional markets (Japan, Southeast Asia, Middle East). Definitions/Methodologies establish the company’s core operational framework as “front-loaded high-quality R&D + global multi-platform synergy + precise localized publishing.” Procedures/Strategies detail cross-platform technical adaptation, region-specific localized publishing, and long-term product lifecycle management. Claims assert that the project’s recognizable art style and “multi-dimensional weapon combinations × 3D combat” system break traditional genre limits, and that Hero Games successfully balances innovative development with mature product operations using a proven global methodology. Evidence Types are qualitative, relying on high player anticipation across multiple global test rounds and regional market case studies demonstrating localization success and long-term stability. Dates, quantitative metrics, tables, and figures are not present in this section.

Topics covered include action game genre boundary expansion, high-freedom combat mechanics, distinctive artistic direction, cross-device (PC/mobile) adaptation, global IP influence building, and long-term refined operations for mature titles. Entities referenced are Hero Games, the featured game project, traditional action games, global test participants, 《新三国志》, 《Last Island of Survival》, and regional markets (Japan, Southeast Asia, Middle East). Definitions/Methodologies establish the company’s core operational framework as “front-loaded high-quality R&D + global multi-platform synergy + precise localized publishing.” Procedures/Strategies detail cross-platform technical adaptation, region-specific localized publishing, and long-term product lifecycle management. Claims assert that the project’s recognizable art style and “multi-dimensional weapon combinations × 3D combat” system break traditional genre limits, and that Hero Games successfully balances innovative development with mature product operations using a proven global methodology. Evidence Types are qualitative, relying on high player anticipation across multiple global test rounds and regional market case studies demonstrating localization success and long-term stability. Dates, quantitative metrics, tables, and figures are not present in this section.
